scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail -n client,server -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others --kill-others-on-fail -n client,server,docs -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server" "npm --prefix docs run start"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
